channel.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Get the latest updates for popular awesome list

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome May 31st, 2021
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Extensions

  • Eventbus Servicestars3 - Code generator for type-safe event bus communication via simple Kotlin interfaces.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 26th, 2021
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Schedulerstars0 - A lightweight plugable scheduler based on plain Vert.x core without any external libs for scheduling with cron-style and interval timers with a detail monitor on both sync and async task.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Utilities

  • Contextual loggingstars7 - Mapped Diagnostic Context (MDC) that works with the Vert.x event-loop model.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jan 4th, 2021
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Donkeystars210 - Modern Clojure HTTP server and client built for ease of use and performance.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Dec 7th, 2020
item.description:
Presentations

  • Vert.x Youtube channel

    • Tutorials

  • Vert.x - From zero to (micro-) hero
  • Introduction to Vert.x

    • Articles

  • Going reactive with Eclipse Vert.x and RX Java
  • First Steps With Vert.x and Infinispan - Part 2: PUSH API
  • First Steps With Vert.x and Infinispan - Part 1: REST API
  • Location Transparency With Vert.x
  • Reactive Microservices and Service Discovery with Vert.x
  • https://dzone.com/articles/vertx-330-development-automation
  • Vert.x 3.3.0 Features Enhanced Networking Microservices, Testing and More
  • Launching Vert.x Dynamically
  • Secure Your Vertx 3 App With Pac4j
  • Interview with Tim Fox About Vert.x 3, the Original Reactive, Microservice Toolkit for the JVM

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 17th, 2020
item.description:
Build tools

  • Vert.x Codegen Gradle pluginstars9 - A Gradle plugin to facilitate the codegen usage for Vert.x Java projects.

    • Middleware

  • API Frameworkstars7 - Vert.x and Glue based microservice framework removing distinction between standalone and serveless application. All services can run in standalone server, but, if required, same codebase can be used to run any service as serverless application.

    • Reactive

  • Vert.x Effect - Pure functional and reactive library based on the IO Monad to implement any complex flow. Full support for retry, fallback and recovery operations.

    • Dependency Injection

  • Gluestars1 - Proven and opinionated programming, and configuration model for Java and Vert.x based applications. Inspired from ATG Nucleus, provides powerful layer base configuration management using simple properties file.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 17th, 2020
item.description:
Examples

  • Starter Single Verticle APIstars3 - REST API Starter and Project Template ready to deploy with lots of plumbing code, examples, and documentation to quickly develope an API with almost no knowledge of vert.x and without any waste of time.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Vert.x Webstars873 - Full featured web toolkit for Vert.x.

    • Authentication Authorisation

  • Vert.x Auth JDBC - Vert.x authentication/authorisation JDBC based.
  • Vert.x Auth JWT - Vert.x Authorisation based on JSON Web Tokens.
  • Vert.x Auth Shiro - Vert.x AuthN/AuthZ based on Apache Shiro.
  • Vert.x Auth htdigest - Vert.x Authorisation/Authentication based on Apache htdigest.
  • Vert.x Auth Mongo - Vert.x Authorisation/Authentication based on MongoDB.
  • Vert.x Auth OAuth2 - Vert.x Authorisation/Authentication based on OAuth 2.
  • Vert.x Auth htpasswd - Vert.x Authorisation/Authentication based on htpasswd.

    • Language Support

  • Ceylonstars12 - Ceylon support.
  • Groovystars14 - Groovy support.
  • Javastars12.1k - Vert.x main repository (including the Java API).
  • JavaScriptstars32 - JavaScript support.
  • Rubystars14 - Ruby support.
  • Scalastars97 - - Scala support.
  • Kotlinstars217 - - Kotlin support.

    • Reactive

  • Reactive Streamsstars48 - Vert.x Reactive Streams.
  • Vert.x Rxstars136 - Vert.x Reactive Extensions.
  • Vert.x Syncstars93 - Vert.x fiber support.
  • Kotlin coroutines - Vert.x support for Kotlin coroutines.

    • Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • JavaScript - JavaScript event bus client.
  • Ruststars9 - Event bus client for Rust applications through TCP.

    • Cluster Managers

  • Hazelcast Cluster Managerstars57 - Hazelcast cluster manager.
  • Ignite Cluster Managerstars31 - Ignite cluster manager.
  • Zookeeper Cluster Managerstars70 - Zookeeper cluster manager.
  • Infinispan Cluster Managerstars13 - Infinispan cluster manager.

    • Cloud Support

  • OpenShift DIY cartridgestars1 - OpenShift DIY Cartridge using Vert.x.
  • OpenShift Vert.x cartridgestars20 - OpenShift Vert.x Cartridge using Vert.x.

    • Docker

  • Docker images - Docker images for Vert.x.

    • Microservices

  • Service Discoverystars101 - Vert.x Service Discovery.
  • Circuit Breakerstars53 - Vert.x Circuit Breaker.
  • Service Discovery - Consulstars101 - Consul extension to Vert.x Service Discovery.
  • Service Discovery - Docker linksstars101 - Docker extension to Vert.x Service Discovery.
  • Service Discovery - Kubernetesstars101 - Kubernetes extension to Vert.x Service Discovery.
  • Service Discovery - Redis backendstars101 - Redis storage backend for Vert.x Service Discovery.

    • Service Factory

  • Service Factorystars20 - Vert.x Service Factory.
  • Maven Service Factorystars11 - Maven Vert.x Service Factory.
  • HTTP Service Factorystars8 - Vert.x HTTP Service Factory.

    • Testing

  • Vert.x Unitstars29 - Async polyglot unit testing for Vert.x.
  • Vert.x JUnit5stars34 - Async unit testing for Vert.x with junit5.
  • Vert.x WireMongostars8 - Lightweight MongoDB mocking for Vert.x

    • Development Tools

  • Vert.x shellstars26 - Allows for interaction with Vert.x from the command line.

    • Distribution

  • Vert.x Stackstars117 - Vert.x + the endorsed modules.

    • Examples

  • Vert.x blueprint - Microservice applicationstars671 - The official Vert.x blueprint showing how to build a complex microservice application.
  • Vert.x blueprint - Job Queuestars125 - The official Vert.x blueprint showing how to build a distributed job processing application.
  • Vert.x blueprint - TODO backendstars169 - The official Vert.x blueprint showing how to build a backend for a TODO application.
  • Vert.x examplesstars3.1k - The official Vert.x examples including web examples, how to use the official database clients, etc.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 24th, 2020
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Cloudopt Nextstars224 - Cloudopt Next is a very lightweight and modern, JVM-based, full stack kotlin framework designed for building modular, easily testable JVM applications with support for Java, Kotlin language, crafted from the best of breed Java libraries and standards.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Integration

  • File Server
    • Vert.x TFTP Clientstars1 - TFTP client for Vert.x support download/upload files.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 28th, 2019
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x CronUtilsstars7 - An abstraction of cron-utils for the vertx scheduler. Unix, Cron4j and Quartz style expressions are supported.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 15th, 2019
item.description:
Microservices

  • Apache ServiceComb Java Chassisstars1.7k - ServiceComb Java Chassis is a Software Development Kit (SDK) for rapid development of microservices in Java, providing service registration, service discovery, dynamic routing, and service management features.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 6th, 2019
item.description:
Development Tools

  • openapi-generatorstars8.5k - OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3).

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 28th, 2019
item.description:
Cloud Support

  • AWS SDKstars38 - Use AWS Java SDK v2 (async) with Vert.x

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome May 27th, 2019
item.description:
Language Support

  • Phpstars12 - Php support.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Template Engines

  • KorTE Template Enginestars58 - Kotlin Template Engine similar to Twig/Django/Liquid supporting calling Kotlin suspend methods.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Mar 20th, 2019
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Serverxstars16 - Allows you to quickly and easily set up a Vert.x-powered server using only route handler annotations.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Mar 18th, 2019
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • Elixirstars14 - Event bus support for Elixir apps using TCP socket.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 28th, 2019
item.description:
Cluster Managers

  • Consul Cluster Managerstars15 - Consul cluster manager.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Dec 4th, 2018
item.description:
Language Support

  • EcmaScriptstars694 - EcmaScript >=6 (JavaScript) support.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 30th, 2018
item.description:
Config

  • Vert.x Config AWS SSM Storestars0 - A config store implementation for retrieving configuration values from the AWS EC2 SSM Parameter Store.

    • Dependency Injection

  • QBitstars703 - QBit works with Spring DI and Spring Boot (and of course Vert.x). Allows you to use QBit, Vert.x, Spring DI and Spring Boot in the same application.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 29th, 2018
item.description:
Integration

  • CNCF CloudEvents
    • CloudEvents.io Java SDKstars190 - Send and receive CloudEvents using the Vert.x HTTP Transport for CloudEvents.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Examples

  • Knative - An example application on how to use Reactive Extensions Vert.xstars136 with Knative.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Books

  • Vert.x in Action by Julien Ponge

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 11th, 2018
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • Javastars9 - Simple Java Event Bus Client using plain TCP socket I/O.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 31st, 2018
item.description:
Microservices

  • Autonomous Servicesstars0 - A toolkit for creating autonomous services. An architecture that leverages vert.x and nannoq-tools to provide an event-based reactive architecure without centralized components, neither for communication or data, providing a theoretically linear scalability across the architecture.

    • Utilities

  • Nannoq-Tools - Nannoq-Tools is a toolkit for constructing robust, scalable and distributed applications leveraging Vert.x including modules for authentication, cluster management, Firebase Cloud Messaging, DynamoDB, fully generic queries, REST, and more.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Vert.x Vaadinstars31 - Run Vaadin applications on Vert.x.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 13th, 2018
item.description:
Middleware

  • Gravitee.io - An OSS API Platform including an API Gateway and an OAuth2 / OIDC authorization server based on Vert.x Core / Vert.x Web and other modules.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jun 25th, 2018
item.description:
Development Tools

  • Vert.x health checkstars8 - Allows for remote health checking in Vert.x projects.

    • Community

  • Gitter chat general chat for Vert.x releated chat.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Mar 20th, 2018
item.description:
Development Tools

  • Vert.x LiveReloadstars7 - A simple livereload server for Vert.x applications.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Atmosphere Vert.xstars40 - Realtime Client Server Framework for the JVM, supporting WebSockets and Server Sent Events with Cross-Browser Fallbacks.

    • Middleware

  • Gateleenstars64 - Middleware library based on Vert.x to build advanced JSON/REST communication servers.

    • Miscellaneous

  • GDHstars30 - Generalized Diffie-Hellman key exchange Java library built on top of Vert.x.

    • Examples

  • Vert.x Music Storestars61 - An example application on how to build Vert.x applications with RxJava.
  • Vert.x PostgreSQL Starterstars30 - A starter to build a monolithic CRUD RESTful Web Service with Vert.x stack and PostgreSQL.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 7th, 2018
item.description:
Config

  • Vert.x Bootstars41 - Deploying verticles from a HOCON configuration.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Vert.x Bootstars41 - Deploying verticles from a HOCON configuration.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jan 13th, 2018
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • REST.VertXstars122 - Lightweight JAX-RS (RestEasy) like annotation processor for Vert.x verticals.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Dec 16th, 2017
item.description:
Examples

  • Cloud Foundrystars1 - An example Vert.x for deploying to a Cloud Foundry service provider.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Dec 11th, 2017
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Irkedstars26 - Annotations-based configuration for Vert.x 3 Web and controller framework.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 18th, 2017
item.description:
Reactive

  • VxRifa - Utility library for Vert.X that allows using strong-typed interfaces in communication through EventBus.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 9th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Dataloaderstars65 - Java port of Facebook Dataloader for Vert.x. Efficient batching and caching for your data layer.

    • Community

  • 2017 Events - A list of 2017 Vert.x talks and presentations.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 19th, 2017
item.description:
Middleware

  • Apache Camel - Apache Camel component for bridging Camel with the Vert.x event bus.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 15th, 2017
item.description:
Development Tools

  • slush-vertx - A template driven Vert.x project generator for different languages and build tools.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 5th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x GraphQL Utilsstars20 - A route handler and Vert.x compatible interfaces to handle GraphQL queries in Vert.x and Vert.x Web.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Sep 4th, 2017
item.description:
Build tools

  • Vert.x Maven pluginstars26
  • Vert.x Gradle plugin

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Aug 31st, 2017
item.description:
Microservices

  • Resilience4jstars6.8k - Resilience4j is a fault tolerance library designed for Java8 and functional programming. Resilience4j provides modules for Circuit Breaking, Rate Limiting, Bulkheading, Automatic retrying, Response caching and Metric measuring.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Aug 8th, 2017
item.description:
Social events / Meetups

  • Amsterdam/The Netherlands
  • Paris

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 14th, 2017
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • Smalltalkstars9- Event bus client for Pharo Smalltalk using the TCP-based protocolstars39.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 7th, 2017
item.description:
Examples

  • Crabzillastars45 - Yet another Event Sourcing experiment. A project exploring Vert.x to develop Event Sourcing / CQRS applications.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jun 26th, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • A gentle guide to asynchronous programming with Eclipse Vert.x for Java developers by Julien Ponge, Thomas Segismont and Julien Viet
  • Building Reactive Microservices in Java by Clément Escoffier

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jun 16th, 2017
item.description:
Database Clients

  • vertx-mysql-binlog-clientstars18 - A Vert.x client for tapping into MySQL replication stream.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome May 27th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Web Accesslogstars22 - Just a simple handler to be used in Vert.x Web to generate access logs.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome May 4th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Utilstars2 - A collection of Vert.x utility methods.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Apr 27th, 2017
item.description:
Examples

  • HTTP/2 showcasestars7 - A simple demo, showing how HTTP/2 can drastically improve user experience when a huge latency is involved.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Mar 13th, 2017
item.description:
Examples

  • Vert.x Gentics Mesh Examplestars18 - Example on how to build a template-based web server with Gentics Mesh and handlebars.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Mar 11th, 2017
item.description:
Examples

  • Vert.x Gradle Starterstars10 - Java 8 starter application with example of using Vert.x with Gradle build system, profiles configuration and SLF4J.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • Java - Event bus support in JavaScript through Java code.

    • Front-End

  • VertxUIstars112 - A pure Java front-end toolkit with descriptive fluent views-on-models, POJO traffic, JUnit testing on the virtual DOM or mixed-language on a real DOM, and more.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 17th, 2017
item.description:
Development Tools

  • Vert.x Starter - A browser-based project starter and project templates for Vert.x applications.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Feb 16th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Dependent Verticle Deployerstars5 - A Vert.x Verticle intended to deploy verticles and their dependent verticles.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jan 30th, 2017
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Knot.xstars121 - Efficient & high-performance integration platform for modern websites built on Vert.x 3.

    • Integration

  • Push Notifications
    • Onesignalstars14 - Send push notifications to (mobile/web) apps from your Vert.x application with OneSignal.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jan 28th, 2017
item.description:
Cloud Support

  • S3stars29 - A fully functional Vert.x client for S3.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jan 13th, 2017
item.description:
Search Engines

  • Vert.x Elasticsearch Service (redesign)stars29 - Vert.x 3 Elasticsearch service with event bus proxying. Redesign of the Vert.x Elasticsearch Servicestars58. Heavy usage of DTOs over eventbus and no more JsonObjects. Added support for ES plugins.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Dec 24th, 2016
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x JOLTstars5 - JSON to JSON transformation tool based on the original bazaarvoice JOLT project. Helpful to transform different json structure into an expected json format.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Dependency Injection

  • Vert.x Spring Verticle Factorystars5 - A Vert.x Verticle Factory that makes use of Spring to obtain and configure Verticles.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Oct 24th, 2016
item.description:
Examples

  • Vert.x Todo-Backend implementationstars4 - Pure Java 8 implementation of the Todo MVC backend. Uses a Vert.x LocalMap for storage.
  • Kotlin Todo-Backend implementationstars7 - Kotlin implementation of the Todo MVC backend.
  • Scala Todo-Backend implementationstars1 - Scala implementation of the Todo MVC backend.
  • Grooveex Todo-Backend implementationstars1 - Todo MVC backend implementation with Vert.x + Groovy + some syntactic sugar + DSL routing facilities.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Oct 15th, 2016
item.description:
Development Tools

  • Vert.x for Visual Studio Codestars1 - A Visual Studio Code (polyglot) plugin for Vert.x. Also available from the Marketplace.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Oct 4th, 2016
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Simple File Serverstars80 - An OpenStack Swift compatible distributed object storage server that can serve and securely store billions of large and small files using minimal resources implemented using Vert.x.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Oct 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • Swiftstars5 - Event bus client for Apple's Swift using the TCP-based protocolstars39.
  • Pythonstars13 - Event bus client for Python using the TCP-based protocolstars39.
  • C#stars5 - Event bus client for C# using the TCP-based protocolstars39.
  • Cstars5 - Event bus client for C99 using the TCP-based protocolstars39.
  • Gostars23- Event bus client for Go-lang using the TCP-based protocolstars39.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Aug 26th, 2016
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Asyncstars12 - Portage of caolan/async nodejs module to Vert.x framework that provides helpers methods for common async patterns.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Aug 13th, 2016
item.description:
Authentication Authorisation

  • Vert.x-Pac4jstars111 - Vert.x authentication/authorisation implemented using pac4j.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 27th, 2016
item.description:
Integration

  • Dart
    • Vert.x Dart SockJSstars0 - Dart integration for Vert.x SockJS bridge and plain SockJS with use of dart:js.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Microservices

  • Vert.x GraphQL Service Discoverystars46 - GraphQL service discovery and querying for your Vert.x microservices.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 16th, 2016
item.description:
Community

  • User Group - Discuss all user issues related to using Vert.x.
  • Developer Group - A group for Vert.x core developers and contributors.
  • Issues - Vert.x core issue tracker.
  • Wiki - Contains useful information about Vert.x.
  • Blog - The official Vert.x blog containing many tutorials and other information.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 12th, 2016
item.description:
Vert.x Event Bus Clients

  • CLIstars3 - Command-line binary client for Vert.x event bus - pipe in JSON, emit JSON.
  • C++11stars16 - C++11 event bus client.
  • Javastars19 - Java implementation of vertxbus.js.
  • Javastars20 - Java and Android Event Bus Client.

    • Web Frameworks

  • Vert.x Jerseystars152 - Create JAX-RS Jersey resources in Vert.x.
  • Handlersstars9 - Open web framework for Vert.x.
  • QBitstars703 - REST and WebSocket method call marshaling and reactive library.
  • vertx-rest-storagestars18 - Persistence for REST resources in the filesystem or a redis database.
  • Jubileestars330 - A rack compatible Ruby HTTP server built on Vert.x 3.

    • Database Clients

  • vertx-pojo-mapperstars56 - Non-blocking POJO mapping for MySQL and MongoDB.

    • Language Support

  • Pythonstars8 - Python support.

    • Reactive

  • vertx-utilstars20 - Light weight promises & latches for Vert.x.

    • Sync Thread Non Block

  • Syncstars93 - Synchronous but non-OS-thread-blocking verticles.

    • Cluster Managers

  • JGroups Cluster Managerstars4 - JGroups cluster manager.
  • Atomix Cluster Managerstars24 - An Atomix based cluster manager implementation for Vert.x 3.

    • Search Engines

  • Vert.x Elasticsearch Servicestars58 - Vert.x 3 Elasticsearch service with event bus proxying.

    • Service Factory

  • Node.js Service Factorystars3 - Vert.x Node.js Service Factory.

    • Dependency Injection

  • Vert.x Guicestars56 - Vert.x verticle factory for Guice dependency injection.
  • Vert.x HK2stars30 - Vert.x verticle factory for HK2 dependency injection.
  • Spring Vert.x Extensionstars47 - Vert.x verticle factory for Spring DI injection.
  • Vert.x Beansstars19 - Inject Vert.x objects as beans into your Spring application.

    • Examples

  • Vert.x feedsstars126 - Example of an RSS aggregator built using Vert.x, Gradle, MongoDB, Redis, Handlebars templates, AngularJS, the event bus and SockJS.
  • Example using event bus and service proxies to connect vertx and nodestars45 - Step by step example with wiki description showing how to connect Vert.x and Node using event bus and service proxies.

    • Deployment

  • Vert.x Deploy Applicationstars54 - (Seamless) deploy to AWS based Vert.x application clusters.

    • Utilities

  • Chimestars28 - Time scheduler working on Vert.x event bus allowing for scheduling with cron-style and interval timers.
  • Vert.x POJO configstars3 - Allows for mapping between standard JSON configuration and a (type-safe) configuration Java bean. Also allows the configuration bean to be validated through JSR 303.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 11th, 2016
item.description:
Reactive

  • QBitstars703 - Async typed actor-like lib that runs easily in Vert.x Async Callbacks. Callback management.

    • Miscellaneous

  • vertx-redisquesstars11 - A highly scalable redis-persistent queuing system for Vert.x.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 5th, 2016
item.description:
Integration

  • REST
    • Vert.x REST Clientstars37 - A REST client for Vert.x with support for RxJava and request caching.
    • Retrofit adapter for Vert.xstars29 - A highly scalable adapter for Retrofit with Vert.x.
    • openapi4j adapter for Vert.x - OpenAPI 3 request validator and router factory alternative.
    • Vert.x Effect HTTP client - Pure functional and reactive HTTP client using Vert.x Effect with OAuth support and retry, fallback and recovery operations.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Utilities

  • Vert.x Cronstars54 - Schedule events with cron specifications. Has event bus and Observable versions.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome May 2nd, 2016
item.description:
Integration

  • Netflix - Hystrix
    • Hystrix Metrics Streamstars14 - Emits metrics for Hystrix Dashboard from a Vert.x application with Hystrixstars21.5k.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Apr 28th, 2016
item.description:
Service Factory

  • Eclipse SISU Service Factoriesstars2 - Vert.x integration with Eclipse SISU DI container offering alternatives for vertx-service-factory and vertx-maven-service-factory.

    • Dependency Injection

  • Vert.x Eclipse SISUstars2 - Vert.x integration with Eclipse SISU DI container.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Apr 1st, 2016
item.description:
Integration

  • Server-Sent Events
    • jEaSSEstars57 - Java Easy SSE. A simple, lightweight implementation of SSE.
    • vertx-ssestars35 - Vert.x SSE implementation + event-bus SSE bridge.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Nov 1st, 2015
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Vert.x Child Processstars42 - Spawn child process from Vert.x.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Oct 13th, 2015
item.description:
Development Tools

  • Vert.x Hotstars48 - A Maven plugin for the hot-deploy of Maven Vert.x projects.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Aug 31st, 2015
item.description:
Web Frameworks

  • Kovertstars147 - Invisible REST framework for Kotlin + Vert.x Web.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Examples

  • Vert.x Markdown servicestars6 - Example on how to use service-proxystars61 with Gradle.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jul 1st, 2015
item.description:
Search Engines

  • Vert.x Solr Servicestars5 - Vert.x 3 Solr service with event bus proxying.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jun 22nd, 2015
item.description:
Integration

  • Metrics
    • Hawkular metricsstars5 - Hawkular implementation of the Vert.x Metrics SPI.
    • DropWizard metricsstars32 - Metrics implementation using DropWizard metrics.
    • Micrometer metricsstars35 - Metrics implementation using Micrometer metrics.
    • OpenTsDb Metricsstars11 - OpenTsDb metrics client for Vert.x.
    • Bosun Monitoringstars3 - Bosun client library for Vert.x.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jun 19th, 2015
item.description:
Integration

  • JavaEE
    • JCA adaptorstars10 - Java Connector Architecture Adaptor for the Vert.x event bus.
    • Weldstars46 - Brings the CDI programming model into the Vert.x ecosystem (register CDI observer methods as Vert.x message consumers, CDI-powered Verticles, define routes in a declarative way, etc.).
  • Meteor
    • Meteorstars18 - Meteor integration support through Vert.x event bus.
  • Mail
    • SMTPstars26 - Async SMTP client.
    • vertx-smtp-serverstars4 - SMTP server bridging to EventBus.
  • Messaging
    • AMQP 1.0stars6 - Interact with AMQP 1.0 servers using the Vert.x Producer and Consumer APIs.
    • MQTTstars119 - Provides two different components: an MQTT server for handling all the MQTT communication and messages exchanges with clients and an MQTT client for sending and receiving messages against an MQTT broker.
    • RabbitMQstars61 - A RabbitMQ client (AMQP 0.9.1).
    • Kafka Clientstars59 - A Kafka client.
    • kafkastars29 - Kafka client for consuming and producing messages.
    • Kafka Servicestars29 - Kafka producer and consumer with retry logic.
    • SaltStackstars1 - A bi-directional bridge between the SaltStack event system and the Vert.x event bus.
    • STOMPstars24 - A Kafka client and server.
    • ZeroMQstars11 - ZeroMQ Event Bus bridge.
    • MQTT Broker - MQTT Broker (MQTT ver. 3.1.1 and 3.1 compliant).
    • Azure ServiceBusstars0 - Azure ServiceBus producer and consumer (fully async, doesn't use Microsoft Azure SDK).
    • AMQP 1.0 - Kafka bridgestars143 - Bridge for sending/receiving messages to/from Apache Kafka using the AMQP 1.0 protocol.
    • Vert.x Kafka Clientstars59 - Apache Kafka client for reading and sending messages from/to an Apache Kafka cluster.
    • The White Rabbitstars75 - An asynchronous RabbitMQ (AMQP) client based on Kotlin coroutines.
    • WAMP Brokerstars2 - A WAMP broker you can embed into your Vert.x application.

item.title: vert-x3/vertx-awesome Jun 7th, 2015
item.description:
Database Clients

  • Relational Databases
    • Reactive SQL Clientstars704 - High performance reactive SQL client.
    • JDBCstars94 - Asynchronous interface around a JDBC datasource.
    • MySQL / PostgreSQLstars108 - Asynchronous Client for MySQL/PostgreSQL.
    • PostgreSQLstars61 - Reactive PostgreSQL Client.
    • databasestars38 - Client for Oracle, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, HyperSQL, etc. designed for security, correctness, and ease of use.
    • jOOQstars310 - Doing typesafe, asynchronous SQL and generate code using jOOQ.
    • jOOQxstars13 - Leverages the power of typesafe SQL from jOOQ DSL and uses the reactive and non-blocking SQL driver from Vert.x.
  • NoSQL Databases
    • MongoDBstars44 - An asynchronous client for interacting with a MongoDB database.
    • Redisstars92 - Asynchronous API to interact with Redis.
    • Cassandrastars30 - A Vert.x client allowing applications to interact with a Cassandra service.
    • Cassandrastars39 - Asynchronous API to interact with Cassandra and Cassandra Mapping.
    • OrientDBstars7 - Non-blocking OrientDB server integration.
    • Bitsystars1 - Non-blocking Bitsy Graph server integration.
    • MarkLogicstars2 - Asynchronous client for Marklogic Database Server.
    • SirixDB - Non-blocking SirixDB HTTP-server.
    • DGraphstars1 - An example on how to build a Vert.x gRPC compliant client. Here targeting dgraph
    • RxFirestorestars9 - Non-blocking Firestore SDK written in a reactive way.
    • MongoDBstars3 - Pure functional and reactive MongoDB client on top of Vert.x Effectstars3. Full support for retry, fallback and recovery operations.
